questionHtml:
Hydrogen and iodine react to form hydrogen iodide.

H2 (g) + I2 (g) ⇌ 2HI (g)

State two conditions necessary for a successful collision between reactants.

meta.title: State two conditions necessary for a successful collision between reactants.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.2—How fast? The rate of chemical change

Reactivity 2.2.2—Species react as a result of collisions of sufficient energy and proper orientation. Explain the relationship between the kinetic energy of the particles and the temperature in kelvin, and the role of collision geometry.
